title: baldellia repens subsp. cavanillesii
intro: Baldellia repens subsp. cavanillesii, also known as Cavanilles' water stargrass, is a rare and endemic subspecies of the Baldellia repens plant, which is a type of aquatic plant found in the Iberian Peninsula. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including its antiseptic and anti-inflammatory effects. The health benefits of Baldellia repens subsp. cavanillesii include its ability to treat skin conditions, wounds, and respiratory issues. The plant can be prepared as an infusion, decoction, or tincture, and is often used in herbal remedies to promote healing and reduce inflammation.
